# Headless DAM: Comprehensive System Architecture & Codebase Context

This document contains the core implementations for the Headless DAM's Collection Workspace module.

## 1. Database Schema & Migrations

**Upgrade Collections (TTL & Type):**
```ruby
class UpgradeCollectionsForSmartRouting < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
  def change
    add_column :collections, :collection_type, :string, default: 'manual', null: false
    add_column :collections, :expires_at, :datetime
    add_reference :collection_assets, :collection_rule, null: true, foreign_key: true
    add_column :collection_assets, :pinned, :boolean, default: false, null: false
  end
end
```

**Create Collection Rules (AI Semantic Brain):**
```ruby
class CreateCollectionRules < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
  def change
    create_table :collection_rules do |t|
      t.references :collection, null: false, foreign_key: true
      t.text :semantic_prompt, null: false
      t.decimal :similarity_threshold, precision: 4, scale: 3, default: 0.800
      t.jsonb :metadata_filters, default: {}
      t.boolean :active, default: true, null: false
      t.timestamps
    end
    add_index :collection_rules, :metadata_filters, using: :gin
  end
end
```
